content.en:
The Lord of Hiiragi took out this black boulder.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Origin Black Stone!" "This treasure is very peculiar, he can refine the will of the Origin Realm, I have not yet given birth to the Will of the Origin Realm, so this treasure is of little use to me for the time being." But once you have the will of the Origin Realm, you can use it to refine and improve your will. Even if you don't need it, you can take it out and sell it, you can exchange it for a lot of resources. I use it to trade, I should be qualified enough!"

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

He made a deal with the Lord of Hiiragi.

The Lord of Hiiragi Leaf obtained thirty-two Void Dragon Crystals, and Ye Tian obtained this Origin Black Stone.

Ye Tian didn't think that the other party had made a fake Origin Black Stone, because he felt that this Origin Black Stone was attracted to the will of the Origin Realm, and it was definitely a real guy.

Besides, the Lord of Hiiragi will not really offend him, otherwise it will be tantamount to provoking a great enemy for himself.

After closing the deal, he left.

Although he had other surplus Void Dragon Crystals, he couldn't find a suitable trading partner for a while.

This time, he had already traded with a genius of the other side, and time was running out, so he chose to leave directly.

......

Above the Origin Kunmon.

The Lord of the White Capital is still waiting here.

At this time, there was already a genius from the other side who had returned.

Some knew that they had no hope, so they gave up directly and chose to come back, while others gathered a hundred Void Dragon Crystals and completed the first assessment before returning.

Soon.

Ye Tian is also back.

"Lord of the White Capital, this is a hundred Void Dragon Crystals!"

Ye Tian took out the Void Dragon Crystal and handed it to the Lord of the White Capital.

But.

The Lord of the White Capital didn't ask for it, but waved his hand and said, "Very good, stand over there!"

That was the place where the other side-level geniuses who had gathered a hundred Void Dragon Crystals should stand.

Obviously, other other shore-level geniuses must have failed to complete this assessment and were directly eliminated.

And at this time.

The other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island also glanced at Ye Tian a few more times, their eyes full of surprise.

They didn't expect Ye Tian to really gather a hundred Void Dragon Crystals.

Before, they also told the Lord of the White Capital that they were not optimistic about Ye Tian, but the Lord of the White Capital was optimistic about Ye Tian.

Now it seems that the eyes of the Lord of the White Capital are ruthless, and he can see at a glance that Ye Tian is not simple.

Now, Ye Tian has passed the first assessment, and coupled with Ye Tian's potential, he has almost joined Fengya Island 100% steadily.

Over time.

Other Shore-level geniuses arrived one after another, some of them took out a hundred Void Dragon Crystals with excitement on their faces, while some of them only took out a few or dozens of Void Dragon Crystals, their faces full of loss.

Finally.

Time's up!

Even if there are still other geniuses who have not come back and have not fallen, it is equivalent to falling.

Because the Lord of the White Capital will not continue to wait.

"Let's go!"

As soon as the Lord of the White Capital commanded, the Origin Kun Beast immediately fled and headed for the eastern region of the Land of Eternity.

After some time, they returned to where they had been.

Then.

Some Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were already waiting here.

There were a few Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors who didn't see the other side level geniuses in their own forces, and their faces changed drastically one by one.

They had anticipated the situation, and there were two situations, one was that they had already fallen, and the other was that they had not yet had time to return.

Immediately.

They left, returned to their own forces, and then figured out a way to deduce, and if they were still alive, they had to find a way to rescue them.

The Lord of the White Capital won't save it because it's okay, but they can't give up.

Of course.

They also knew very well that the greatest possibility was that they had fallen, otherwise they would not have rushed back when the time of the primeval era came.

......

After all the eliminated Beyond Geniuses left, only the fifty-three Beyond Geniuses who had passed the first level remained.

In other words, there are more than a dozen of them who have to be eliminated among these other side level geniuses.

After all, Fengya Island only recruits thirty-six geniuses at the other side, and this is a rule that will not be an exception.

"Let's go!"

The Lord of the White Capital didn't say much, and directly ordered the Origin Kun Beast to leave.

Next, they are going to the place where the second level is.

After some time, they came to an island in the Black River.

"Is this Stormtooth Island?"

A peer-level genius asked curiously.

"Naturally, it's not Wind Tooth Island!" said one of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island: "You haven't officially joined Wind Tooth Island, so naturally you can't enter Wind Tooth Island, this is just a special island in the Origin Black River, and it has nothing to do with Wind Tooth Island." "

Subsequently.

The Origin Kunmon landed on this island.

Immediately after, many other level geniuses followed the Lord of the White Capital down.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital brought many other shore-level geniuses to a cliff on this island, and countless lines were recorded on this rock wall.

Ye Tian sensed a special force from above this array, and this power was related to the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side.

At this time, the Lord of the White Capital introduced: "This is a weakened version of the supreme technique of the other side, you only need to comprehend it and use it!"

"The Supreme Technique on the other side, what is this?"

Some other shore-level geniuses hadn't heard of it, so they asked curiously.

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it either, so he was also very curious, but when other other shore-level geniuses asked, he didn't ask, but listened to the explanation of the Lord of the White Capital.

The Lord of the White Capital introduced: "The supreme technique of the other side is a technique that only a genius of the other side can cultivate, and you can understand it as the advanced application and derivation of the magic power of the other side. First of all, after the Supreme Technique of the other side of the other world is weakened, it can be taught. Any genius at the other side level can cultivate, but after practice, he can't exert his power, and it is not as good as the magic of the other side. But once he creates the supreme technique on the other side, its power will be terrifying!"

"However, it is very difficult to practice the supreme technique of the other side, and it is necessary to master 109,600 golden scripts and 109,600 black scripts of the other side. No force in the east can master so many golden texts and black texts on the other side, and only we, Fengya Island, can master so many golden texts and black texts on the other side. "

"But if you enter Fengya Island, you can learn these Beibei Haven and Bei'an Jinwen, but you are not allowed to teach them, otherwise you will defect to Fengya Island!"

"Okay, I'll give you a hundred primeval eras, practice here, and practice this weakened version of the supreme technique on the other side, and you can enter Wind Tooth Island!"
